text.title: journey-mapping Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for journey-mapping as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent hallucinate emotions when no sentiment evidence exists in the input corpus
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always require "no data" as a valid cell value. Agents fill empty cells with plausible-sounding emotions that are invention, not research. Invented emotional arcs produce false consensus.

failure-mode.description: Agent smooths emotional arcs, producing a gentle curve rather than sharp dips
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Real journeys have sharp emotional drops at friction points. Prompt explicitly: "identify variance and sharp drops, not average sentiment." Smooth arcs hide the most actionable insights.

failure-mode.description: Future-state map labeled as current-state research
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Future-state maps generated by agents are design proposals, not research outputs. Label explicitly on the artifact: "Future State — Design Hypothesis (not validated with users)".
